education.degree: M.S. in Computer and Information Science
education.school: University of Arkansas at Little Rock

companies.title: Software Engineer
achievements: Developed a responsive React.js banking portal from scratch, adding account management features and secure transaction filters, resulting in a 30% increase in customer self-service logins within 6 months.
Built 12 RESTful APIs for real-time banking operations using Node.js and MongoDB, achieving sub-200ms response times under peak load (~1,200 daily transactions) and ensuring uptime.
Migrated over 50,000 customer records from legacy AS/400 systems to a modern MongoDB cluster in 3 months, significantly reducing reconciliation errors and meeting GDPR data audit requirements.
Executed a unit testing strategy for the payments module using Jest, increasing test coverage to 85%, and catching critical bugs 3-4 days earlier in QA cycles.

Delivered 8 compliance features in collaboration with the risk and finance teams (SOX thresholds, daily transaction caps) in 4 Agile sprints, which passed regulatory audit reviews with zero major findings.

companies.title: Software Engineer
achievements: Deployed an internal audit automation platform using Java and Spring Boot, reducing manual data entry time for audit teams by an average of 80 hours/month, while integrating MySQL for secure storage of over 3 years of historical data.
Automated 4 ETL pipelines for finance reporting, cutting month-end report processing time from 3 days to under 5 hours, enabling near real-time insights for decision-makers.
Collaborated with UI developers to deliver a real-time Angular dashboard for tracking team utilization and project margins, used daily by 500+ consultants across departments.
Migrated 6 internal databases to AWS RDS within 6 months, improving data access times and reducing server maintenance hours by 40+ hours per month.
Refactored and optimized 40+ complex SQL queries, reducing report generation time from 2-3 minutes to under 15 seconds, enabling faster access to regulatory and tax audit data.
Supported role-based access control (RBAC) deployment for KPMG enterprise data lake, managing access across 12 departments and aligning with SOX/GDPR compliance guidelines.
Devised integration services to connect HRMS and CRM systems via internal APIs, automating 10+ manual employee workflows and reducing HR operational delays by 2-3 days per cycle.

companies.title: Software Engineer
achievements: Formulated 20+ scalable RESTful APIs using Java 8, AWS, MVC, and DynamoDB to facilitate data processing between microservices, reducing latency by 50ms, balancing traffic distribution, and enhancing data consistency across systems.

Engineered responsive web applications using Angular, constructing modular components and connecting them with backend APIs, ensuring smooth data flow and elevating the overall user experience across diverse platforms.

Formulated 100+ unit tests and integration tests using JUnit and Mockito for bug detection and critical error handling, ensuring comprehensive test coverage and maintaining code reliability in projects with 5000+ lines of code.

Implemented a CI/CD pipeline using AWS CDK, Git, and CloudFormation for automating builds and deployments, ensuring production-readiness of the code and participating in code reviews to maintain high code quality.
Orchestrated containerized services using Docker and Kubernetes, improving scalability and reliability of microservices.

companies.company: University of Arkansas at Little Rock
companies.title: Graduate Assistant
achievements: Mentored over 100+ master's students on Java, AJAX, JSON, jQuery, and Spring Boot MVC, guiding them through web development concepts and tools.
Conducted online classes, hands-on labs, and project reviews, helping students build web applications using Spring Boot MVC and RESTful APIs.
Supported course delivery and provided technical support during labs, resolving issues related to AJAX, JSON, and Hibernate for seamless development.
Evaluated student projects, offering feedback on code quality, design, and the use of Spring Boot and Hibernate for backend optimization.
Collaborated with the professor to create assignments that integrated Spring Boot, AJAX, and JSON for data-driven web applications.

companies.title: Software Engineer
achievements: Engineered 50+ T-SQL queries for database performance tuning, indexing, and query optimization for large-scale databases with over 1 million records.
Built microservices and RESTful APIs using Spring Boot and Java, improving scalability and backend performance for large-scale healthcare applications.
Integrated Spring Security to enforce role-based access control (RBAC) and token-based authentication, securing sensitive healthcare endpoints and ensuring HIPAA compliance across services.
Developed custom authentication providers and JWT-based login flows, improving login speed and enabling stateless session management across microservices.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, Terraform, Docker, and Kubernetes, reducing deployment times by 40%.
Leveraged AWS (Lambda, EC2, API Gateway, CloudFormation, Fargate) for cloud-native deployments, ensuring high system availability and performance.
Assembled Kubernetes orchestration to improve reliability and scalability of containerized applications, while monitoring using Prometheus and CloudWatch.

projects.name: Healthcare Claims Management System
projects.description: Microservices-based claims management system automating 10,000+ daily claims and reducing manual effort by 4 hours daily.
projects.outcome: Automated 10,000+ daily claims processing using Spring Boot and AWS Lambda, reducing manual review time by 4 hours per day and improving claims accuracy by 35%.

projects.name: E-commerce Inventory Management System
projects.description: Full-stack inventory management system processing 1,000+ daily transactions with real-time stock updates.
projects.outcome: Built RESTful API with Node.js and MongoDB processing 1,000+ daily transactions, designed responsive React.js interface reducing downtime during stock migrations by 60%.
